Overrides.Override: 5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
Buffs on you expire 30% slower Debuffs on you expire 30% faster Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Warp

Skill.source: Item:10:Shroud of the Lightless, Carnal Armour

Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Foe Twirl Cogwork Ring Unique ID: dde4deecdabdbbe972b15ca2de7accfbc112e0a290119e469431f46282cb389d Item Level: 85 LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 4 -1 Prefix Modifier allowed +1 Suffix Modifier allowed Implicit Modifiers Cannot Be Changed 25% increased Suffix Modifier magnitudes {fractured}+50% to Chaos Resistance 87% of Hit Damage from you and your Minions cannot be Reflected +113 to maximum Life +23% to all Elemental Resistances +69% to Fire Resistance {crafted}Non-Channelling Skills have -7 to Total Mana Cost

Rarity: UNIQUE Headhunter Leather Belt Unique ID: dbf5f685d09325cab2548666ae866bce2bbdd9db39a35a4ee430ec3b34cc8e95 Item Level: 85 LevelReq: 8 Implicits: 3 6% increased Strength 6% increased Intelligence 7% increased maximum Life +48 to Strength +60 to Dexterity +56 to maximum Life 30% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE Bubonic Trail Murder Boots Evasion: 222 EvasionBasePercentile: 0 Energy Shield: 22 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.1111 Unique ID: 8772862dc06b44838b6960f34a562f1866e1dacb51020eecdad66b3a61a2e1d8 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G A A LevelReq: 69 Implicits: 0 Has 2 Abyssal Sockets Triggers Level 20 Death Walk when Equipped 60% reduced Duration of Elemental Ailments on You while affected by a Rare Abyss Jewel 32% increased Movement Speed while affected by a Magic Abyss Jewel 24% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills while affected by a Unique Abyss Jewel

Rarity: UNIQUE Yoke of Suffering Onyx Amulet Unique ID: b8f342b98e89b77f6ef159dd44efd85d61d57fd5a6af40f4847e63e91fe95852 Item Level: 85 LevelReq: 20 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Master Fletcher +16 to all Attributes +12% to Fire Resistance +14% to Cold Resistance +49% to Lightning Resistance 31% reduced Duration of Ailments on Enemies 6% chance to Shock Enemies take 12% increased Damage for each type of Ailment you have inflicted on them Your Elemental Damage can Shock Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Loath Wind Spine Bow Unique ID: e09b2eb0eea306050fdde71461dcc45e4a9a1ee536ce63abfd3c060ba79338b4 Item Level: 89 Quality: 30 Sockets: W-W-W-W-W-W LevelReq: 72 Implicits: 5 {crafted}8% increased Explicit Physical Modifier magnitudes Adds 9 to 13 Physical Damage 8% increased Attack Speed Enemies you Kill have a 25% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Physical Damage Item sells for much more to vendors +28 to Strength and Intelligence 278% increased Physical Damage Adds 50 to 88 Physical Damage 19% increased Attack Speed 29% increased Critical Strike Chance Bow Attacks fire 2 additional Arrows +207 to Accuracy Rating
